% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
% HOEFFDING / EW BOUND MODEL (both metrics)
% k = log(2r/delta) / (2*epsilon^2), p = min(1, k/r)
% Zero fitted parameters: epsilon and delta are user-chosen conventions.
% -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

% Default parameters
\newcommand{\hoeffdingEpsilon}{0.05}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingEpsilonCloseness}{0.05}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingEpsilonBetweenness}{0.05}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingDelta}{0.1}
\newcommand{\targetRho}{0.95}

% Hoeffding required k at common reaches (epsilon=0.05, delta=0.1)
\newcommand{\hoeffdingKFiveK}{2303}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingKTenK}{2441}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingKTwentyK}{2580}

% Hoeffding sampling probability at common reaches (closeness)
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPOneK}{100.0}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPTwoK}{100.0}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPFiveK}{46.1}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPTenK}{24.4}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingPTwentyK}{12.9}

% Hoeffding speedup at common reaches (closeness)
\newcommand{\hoeffdingSpeedupFiveK}{2.2}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingSpeedupTenK}{4.1}
\newcommand{\hoeffdingSpeedupTwentyK}{7.8}
